sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n3682" key="a)kroxersi/ths" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἀκρο-χερσίτης</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ου</itype>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ὁ</gen>, nickname of wrestler who broke his opponent's fingers, Paus <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">6.4.1</biblScope></bibl>.</entryFree>
